TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bismack_Biyombo, title = Bismack_Biyombo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bismack_Biyombo} }

S.FORM: == Bismack Biyombo == Bismack Biyombo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, Bismack Biyombo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bismack Biyombo htagan beh sa Lubumbashi, Zaire. mpuw tzyu kawas,Biyombo maki Yaman Mário Palma tbah. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Bismack Biyombo

== Bismack Biyombo == Bismack Biyombo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, Bismack Biyombo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bismack Biyombo htagan beh sa Lubumbashi, Zaire. mpuw tzyu kawas,Biyombo maki Yaman Mário Palma tbah. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Bismack Biyombo
S.PHON: == βis~ɕmaʦ~ʨk βijomβo == βis~ɕmaʦ~ʨk βijomβo ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βis~ɕmaʦ~ʨk βijomβo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βis~ɕmaʦ~ʨk βijomβo ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa luβumβas~ɕħi, zaire. mpuw tzju kawas~ɕ,βijomβo maki jaman m*rio palma tβaħ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βis~ɕmaʦ~ʨk βijomβo
